rules.name: fenced_code_block
rules.description: Protect complete triple-backtick blocks, including the language tag.

rules.name: markdown_link_target
rules.description: Protect URL/path targets while allowing link labels to be translated.

rules.name: path
rules.description: Protect repository paths and common file references.

rules.name: cli_command
rules.description: Protect common command invocations in prose.

rules.name: math_variable
rules.description: Protect compact math symbols and common indexed variables.

rules.name: mermaid_directive
rules.description: Protect Mermaid graph directives inside translated text blocks when extracted separately.
